title: プリンセスパワー☆フルマックス！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Stopping by the cafeteria one afternoon, I see
Kawakami Princess, Hishi Akebono, and Mayano
Top Gun.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Welcome to the Buono Cooking Class! ☆ Today,
we'll be making a cake!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
First, we'll need to slice the carrots into chunks
small enough for the blender. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: On it, chef! Now let's see, where's the knife...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I can't find it. Do you think it's being
washed?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Seems like it. But I really don't want to sit around
and wait, so...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: This'll be quicker! HYAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BAM, BAM, BAM!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: WHOA! You're on fire, Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And those are some perfectly sized pieces!
Buono! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: The batter is ready! Time to pour it into the mold!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Chef Bono, I think a heart mold would be best! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
All right! ☆ Let's go with a heart! Sooo, here's the
mold...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: ...Oh dear. Hmmm, it's a little dented.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're right. This won't make a beautiful
heart at all!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Don't fret. We just need to fix the part that's out
of shape.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Like this...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
HOOHAAAAH!
Ta-dah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CLINK!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whaaa?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Wow, it's just like new! Your method was quite
unorthodox, but very buono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Okay, time to bake! I'll preheat the oven! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Set the temperature to... Huh? The oven light
won't turn on. Maybe it's broken?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: No way! We've come so far!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, no need to worry. Maruzen told me a good
wallop can fix any broken machine.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: What?! Is that really true?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That can't be safe. Just hold on for a second,
Kawak—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Time for my BODY SLAM!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CRASH! BANG! SLAM!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Eeeek! Be carefuuul!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess splits the oven in two with her
attack. The shockwave sends kitchenware
tumbling to the floor.

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text:
What the heck are you all doing in there?! That's
extremely dangerous!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Whoops!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for waiting, Kawakami! Maya and I
finished the cake! How about we eat it
together? ☆

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I got banned from the kitchen... I'm
sorry I couldn't finish cooking with you both.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A princess should not always rely on her
strength... I'm terribly sorry.
